title: G.S.R. 528(E) The Prevention of Cruelty to Animals (Restricted to Exhibit or Trained as a Performing Animals).
description: G.S.R. 528(E) The Prevention of Cruelty to Animals (Restricted to Exhibit or Trained as a Performing Animals).

Bears 2. Monkeys 3. Tigers 4. Panthers 5. Lions 6. Bulls [F.NO.27-1/20U-AWD] ANJANI KUMAR, Director (AW) 2606 GI/2011 Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi.-l 10064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
